recommendations.title: Scorched
recommendations.overview: Three mischievous employees of a bank in a small deserted town all make plans to rob it at the same time, however none of them knows about the others.

recommendations.title: One Small Hitch
recommendations.overview: On a flight home to Chicago for a family wedding, childhood friends Josh and Molly innocently agree to fake a wedding engagement to make Josh's dying father happy. Things quickly get out of hand with their two boisterous families, and a series of eve

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
recommendations.overview: A young Greek woman falls in love with a non-Greek and struggles to get her family to accept him while she comes to terms with her heritage and cultural identity.

recommendations.title: Nada que ver
recommendations.overview: After Carlos is tasked to care for Paola, both characters must work out their differences to make their time together more pleasant. As time goes on, they are faced with lessons about trust, mutual respect, and perhaps love.

recommendations.title: The Week Of
recommendations.overview: The parents of a soon-to-be married couple make the final preparations for the wedding ceremony.

recommendations.title: It's Now or Never
recommendations.overview: Narrates the preparation for a wedding of a Spanish couple in which everything goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Non-Fiction
recommendations.overview: Alain, a successful Parisian publisher struggling to adapt to the digital revolution, has major doubts about the new manuscript of Léonard, one of his long-time authors — another work of auto-fiction recycling his love affair with a minor celebrity.

recommendations.title: Jealous
recommendations.overview: A divorced teacher suddenly becomes jealous of everyone, including her daughter, friends and neighbors.

recommendations.title: Wedding Association
recommendations.overview: Ismail's son, Tarik returns to his village after long years of being away and announces that he is engaged to a Latvian woman named Nugesha and although he doesn't have the means for it, Ismail still wants to be the one who pays for the expenses of t

recommendations.title: The Second Mother
recommendations.overview: After leaving her daughter Jessica in a small town in Pernambuco to be raised by relatives, Val spends the next 13 years working as a nanny to Fabinho in São Paulo. She has financial stability but has to live with the guilt of having not raised Jessi
